author: vadim borisov (tabularis.ai)
name: OrthoInit + Int6 MLP3x + BigramHash + SmearGate
blurb: Six improvements: (1) Orthogonal + muP-scaled weight init (proj scaled by 1/sqrt(2*layers)). (2) Int6 per-row quant on MLP+attention with zstd-22, fp16 tied embedding + last-2-layer K passthrough. (3) 3x MLP. (4) Tuned optimizer: matrix_lr=0.02, Muon momentum 0.99, warmdown 3000, grad clip 0.3, AdamW WD=0.01. (5) SmearGate + Bigram hash. (6) Sliding window eval stride=64, seq=2048.
